name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFO ----

EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences

CONSTANTK   (* Capacity of the buffer *)

VARIABLE buf      (* Sequence representing contents *), buf, head, size, tail
          head     (* Index for next dequeue position *)
          tail     (* Index for next enqueue position *)
          size     (* Current number of elements in the buffer *)

vars == <<buf, head, tail, size>>

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------*)
TypeOk ==
    /\ buf \subseteq Seq(1 .. K)
       \/ buf = []
    /\ head \in 1 .. K + 1
    /\ tail \in 1 .. K + 1
    /\ size \in 0 .. K

Init ==
    /\ buf = [] 
    /\ head = 1
    /\ tail = 1
    /\ size = 0

ProducerEnqueue(x) ==
    LET newBuf == Append(buf, x)
        newTail == IF (tail #= K+1) THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1 IN
    /\ size < K                      (* not full *)
    /\ buf' = newBuf
    /\ tail' = newTail
    /\ head' = head                  (* unchanged *)
    /\ size' = size + 1

ConsumerDequeue(y) ==
    LET oldHeadVal == SubSeq(head..head-1)(buf)[[1]]
         newHead   == IF (head #= K+1) THEN 1 ELSE head + 1 IN
    /\ size > 0                       (* non-empty *)
    /\ y = oldHeadVal                (* consumer receives the value at front *)
    /\ head' = newHead
    /\ tail' = tail                   (* unchanged *)
    /\ size' = size - 1
    /\ UNCHANGED <<buf>>

(* Termination disjunct to avoid deadlock in TLC when no action is possible. *)
Terminating ==
    /\ Unchanged(vars)

Next ==
    \/ ProducerEnqueue(ANY X \in Nat |-> TRUE )      (* enqueue any natural number as placeholder *)
       \/ ConsumerDequeue(NOTUSED Y )
       \/ Terminating

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

====
